title: Redesign main screen with FormAccountPicker style and new layout
acceptance_criteria: Account picker uses FormAccountPicker trigger style (icon + name + balance + chevron) with inline expandable list and search
Total display: large allocated amount as hero, smaller 'of {total}' below, horizontal progress bar showing allocation %
Participants badge/chip showing count (tappable to names screen)
Clear moved to header right as trash icon button
Summary moved to prominent bottom button (only shown when items exist)
BillItemCard onPress navigates to add-item with itemId for editing
